sigWerErrors.reason: 'Verificarlo' (to verify it) and 'revisarlo' (to check/review it) are very close in meaning in this context; both refer to checking the status of the shipment.
Changing 'por la aplicación' (through the app) to 'en la aplicación' (in the app) does not change the overall meaning; both refer to using the app.
The phrase 'en el informe de envío' (in the shipping report) is inserted instead of 'por email' (by email), which changes the method of checking the shipment. This alters the meaning significantly.
